requirement_topic.en: El Salvador Market Access — OSARTEC / OSN, SIGET, and Nascent EV Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 萨尔瓦多市场准入——OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET及初期EV基础设施
requirement_topic.zht: 薩爾瓦多市場准入——OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET及初期EV基礎設施

summary.en: El Salvador's EV charging market is nascent but growing around San Salvador, commercial sites, fleets, and regional technology investment. Market entry should separate product conformity questions handled through OSARTEC / OSN or applicable Salvadoran technical regulations from electricity-sector installation and interconnection questions handled through SIGET, distributors, and site owners. Regional grid context, including Central American interconnection through SIEPAC, does not remove the need for local distributor approval and site-specific electrical design.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期，但正围绕圣萨尔瓦多、商业场站、车队和区域技术投资增长。市场进入应区分由OSARTEC / OSN或适用萨尔瓦多技术法规处理的产品合格评定问题，以及由SIGET、配电公司和场地方处理的电力安装和接入问题。包括SIEPAC中美洲互联在内的区域电网背景，并不免除当地配电公司批准和场站专项电气设计。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期，但正圍繞聖薩爾瓦多、商業場站、車隊和區域技術投資增長。市場進入應區分由OSARTEC / OSN或適用薩爾瓦多技術法規處理的產品合格評定問題，以及由SIGET、配電公司和場地方處理的電力安裝和接入問題。包括SIEPAC中美洲互聯在內的區域電網背景，並不免除當地配電公司批准和場站專項電氣設計。

standards_or_laws: OSARTEC / OSN technical regulation and standards route where applicable
El Salvador General Electricity Law and implementing regulations where applicable

summary.en: A China exporter may hold GB/T test reports, CCC status where applicable, and China domestic grid-acceptance records. These can support technical due diligence but do not establish Salvadoran market access, customs treatment, Spanish labelling acceptance, connector suitability, or grid interconnection approval.
summary.zh: 中国出口商可能持有GB/T测试报告、适用时的CCC状态及中国国内并网验收记录。这些资料可支持技术尽调，但不能证明已满足萨尔瓦多市场准入、海关处理、西班牙语标签接受、接口适配或电网接入批准。
summary.zht: 中國出口商可能持有GB/T測試報告、適用時的CCC狀態及中國國內併網驗收記錄。這些資料可支持技術盡調，但不能證明已滿足薩爾瓦多市場准入、海關處理、西班牙語標籤接受、接口適配或電網接入批准。

gap.en: Before claiming El Salvador readiness, map the importer of record, HS code, rated voltage, radio or cellular modules, connector configuration, Spanish labels and manuals, IEC safety and EMC reports, spare-parts plan, warranty support, and distributor connection route. Confirm directly with OSARTEC / OSN, SIGET, the distributor, and the project owner whether any local certificate, inspection, or registration applies.
gap.zh: 在宣称产品已适合萨尔瓦多前，应明确进口商、HS编码、额定电压、无线或蜂窝模块、接口配置、西班牙语标签和说明书、IEC安全及EMC报告、备件计划、保修支持和配电公司接入路径。应直接向OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET、配电公司和项目业主确认是否适用本地证书、检查或登记。
gap.zht: 在宣稱產品已適合薩爾瓦多前，應明確進口商、HS編碼、額定電壓、無線或蜂窩模組、接口配置、西班牙語標籤和說明書、IEC安全及EMC報告、備件計劃、保修支持和配電公司接入路徑。應直接向OSARTEC / OSN、SIGET、配電公司和項目業主確認是否適用本地證書、檢查或登記。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — depends on product scope, HS code, technical regulation coverage, communications modules, and the distributor or project-owner installation route; SIGET / distributor coordination is mandatory for grid-connected projects
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T / CCC evidence is not a Salvadoran conformity, customs, connector, or grid-approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] El Salvador readiness is a product-plus-project review: OSARTEC / OSN conformity where applicable, SIGET and distributor coordination for power connection, and project confirmation for connector, OCPP, Spanish labelling, and service support.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨尔瓦多准备状态是产品加项目审查：适用时处理OSARTEC / OSN合格评定，电力接入需与SIGET及配电公司协调，并按项目确认接口、OCPP、西班牙语标签和服务支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩爾瓦多準備狀態是產品加項目審查：適用時處理OSARTEC / OSN合格評定，電力接入需與SIGET及配電公司協調，並按項目確認接口、OCPP、西班牙語標籤和服務支持。
